name: Jack Henry Symitar (Core Banking)
description: System of record for members, deposits, and loan servicing. Historical data is snapshot-based; the intelligence layer sits over it rather than replacing it.

name: Thought Machine (Core, migration)
description: The target core. Migration underway. The trust layer bridges Symitar and Thought Machine during cutover so reporting continuity holds.

name: MeridianLink
description: Loan origination and consumer lending pipeline. Source of the 90-day pipeline that frames the liquidity signal.

name: Greenplum on Tanzu
description: Analytics data warehouse. Where transformations occur between source systems and Tableau, and where ETL integrity is monitored.

name: Tableau
description: Current BI and reporting layer. Visualizes figures but carries no native lineage back to source — the gap the trust layer closes.

name: Verafin
description: Third-party fraud analytics. The feed whose late load the trust layer flagged this morning, holding one dependent figure for reconciliation.

name: General Ledger & Board Reporting
description: Aggregated financials, capital and net worth, and the figures that reach the board and the NCUA 5300 Call Report.
